base_url.description: Okta org API base URL, e.g. https://your-org.okta.com. Required: legacy derives this from a bare domain (prepending https://) when base_url is unset, but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits), so this bundle requires the fully-formed URL instead.

api_token.description: Okta API token, sent as 'Authorization: SSWS <api_token>'. Takes priority over access_token when both are configured.

access_token.description: OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token. Used only when api_token is not configured.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
